name: Kernel
description: Three-table quine. The only tables that may exist at this layer are: entities, schemas, carriers, applications, runtime_state. No application logic.
invariants: entities table has columns: id, type, owner, body_ref, metadata_json, created_at
schemas table has columns: id, name, definition_json, created_at
carriers table has columns: id, entity_id, carrier_type, location, access_config_json, created_at
runtime_state table has columns: key, value, updated_at
applications table has columns: id, capability_id, input_ref, output_ref, result, applied_at
no stored procedures, triggers, or views at this layer
